review_text: Very nice place to stay 👌
Good place. I'll stay here again.

Good  location. Otherwise VERY DISAPPOINTED!|- We were told that the room would be services approximately half way through our 7 say visit. This did not happen.|- The cutlery drawer was poorly equipped - only 1 dessert spoon and 1 soup spoon was provided.|- The crockery provisions were minimal - not enough for multiple meals in 1 day for 2 occupants.|- The shower flooded EVERY time we used. We spoke with reception staff who gave no suggestions / help. We happened upon a cleaner who provided us with extra towels to make a barricade to stop the shower flooding the unit. |- The room came equipped with a floor squeegee indicating that the flooding shower was ongoing and known about by management. |- The soap dispenser in the hand basin had no soap in it as it was rusted shut and unable to be opened. No other soap was provided. |- The air conditioning unit failed and we were told it would take 3 days to be repaired.|- The electric frying pan failed and no alternative frying pan to use. When we spoke with reception about this, they sent the maintenance man with an extension lead to run from one side of the unit to the other.  The frying pan then cause the power to the unit to trip.|- The tripped power caused the shower to shut down and we were unable to use the facilities, consequently, we had to walk to the amenities block to shower (we booked a unit specifically as we are elderly and didn't want to walk across the park to use any amenities).|- When we spoke with reception again on check out, we were met with blank faces and no apology. We were told the manager would need to be contacted but that they were uncontactable now.  We were told we may be able to get a discount on our next stay - we live in Queensland and will not be back to WA, PLUS we WON'T BE BACK HERE!
Park of the year❤️❤️
nope zero ⭐ from me

The people here are amazing very comforting understanding and warm hearted they care about everyone and so very helpful I would never stay anywhere else than here the staff are very special people who a care about you if you want a safe caring environment for your family this is the place to be

We booked here a room for one night, because our flight should be very late landing. There was email contact for a late check-in, they should give us a email with code for the key to enter the room. I never get that email, so we didn't could check-in.
We try to call them, no answer.
We had to stay the hole night at the airport because there where no other rooms available.
The next day i try to email the big4 park but never get any answer.
Money is gone, and never spoke to anyone.
So guys, don't trust this park.
It is so unfair, not neet and bad service!
😡😞😭

Part 2: They promised me a refund, but after a week i havent heard or seen any sign of this.
這家旅遊者公園位置適中，服務人員親切。沒有浴室備品。浴室內設備能改善會更好，對我們而言，沙發床有些軟，其他都好，以後會再來住。
Great little getaway. Thankyou

Booked 6 months beforehand and requested room suitable for wheelchair, no stairs and two beds. Was told on arrival you have been upgraded and owe extra money, we didn’t ask to be upgraded .
We got to our room which had very loose unstable stairs, one bed and a very dirty room. Food on utensils  and a bent unusable fork etc. floor made our feet dirty.
We asked for another room and was told no rooms available for two days, so I was trapped . Needed extra assistance to get down stairs. The receptionist was extremely rude. If it wasn’t for family finding us somewhere else to stay  , it would have been the most aweful 10 days. Ps still waiting on refund 19 days later. Not good at all and will never recommend to anyone. If I could give minus -5 stars I would. Also the original cabin I ordered were all mouldy and extremely bad looking , nothing like the photos at all.

This is one sorry excuse for campground. I would not call it a holiday park as much of it is semi permanent caravan housing. Everyone needs a place to live but if you are a tourist looking for a holiday park avoid this. There was near constant signage tell people to use the other amenity block showers and bathrooms but signs were on both.
So clean the room and the staff so friendly.
Recommended place to stay

Don't stay here. Worst Big4 I have ever been too. Many permanent resident sites that are really untidy. Not well looked after, very poor standard. On top of that the noise from overnight works was not disclosed prior too or after booking. Would have found somewhere else. Powered Site.

Find campingplads, med pool og spa samt et lækket fælles køkken, man alt hvad man skal bruge, gode indkøbs mulighed i nærheden i form af indkøbs center samt lokale butikker alt inden for 10 min køre tur eller 30 min på gå ben, wv og bade forhold også super gode lækker dog er der rigtig mange fastlægger så området kan godt virke slidt og lidt gammelt da der er mange gammel vogne at se på, men alt i alt rigtig fin plads

We booked a room many many months ago for my aunty and uncle to be able to visit from over east , upon check in we were told the room we booked was no longer available which unfortunately means my aunty can’t even use the room as she is wheelchair bound with TWO walking sticks as she has a disability, the staff were rude and told us that there was nothing they can do they are booked out and she’s going to have to deal with it ,  there are 3 large steps that she has to get up which she can not do , we went online and there are available accessible rooms but according to the staff they are fully booked out . The bottom step isn’t even attached to the frame and it’s a serious hazard, to be left to fend on our own on those 10 day trip is absolutely disgusting and things will be taken further the mannerism in this situation against us and my aunty with a disability is wrong and not been handled correctly at all . Needless to say after this visit is over we won’t be staying here again or suggesting it for family and friends who visit as we normally send people to stay here as we live on toodyay Rd it’s really disappointing as the staff used to be accommodating even more so when you have booked online months and months in advance to be coming here and snubbed off as such a letdown and to be completely honest, absolutely disgusting
Very good
屋內整齊清潔，附近採購方便
Pretty upsetting not answering calls, service very poor did not even stay.

Sadly we won't be staying here again. The park itself seems very rundown, especially the grounds. We stayed in a Superior Studio that had a shared entrance with another room. Our room was clean and comfortable, but the people in the other room chose to smoke, stinking out our room.
Lots of very noisy undesirables effected by drugs or alcohol in the park.
Bed was  comfortable . The shower has pressure which was a bonus. The air con  made noises while on. And wasn't producing cool air.  That's the  only issue .The room was big enough.That's all .

Clean enough location ok good comms and links and happy for the earlier check in but it’s  another cob. . Poor WiFi  no privacy weird check in where staff wanted to keep a close eye on solo males? Understandable but disconcerting. Not the most warmest of welcomes standard for these places in my experience. |Better available but will do in an emergency.
Great overnight stay - we were attending a wedding in swan valley. Quick trip via uber - so close to so much

Very small van spaces. The amenities are old and tired- but spotless.
It's a great location. Central to everywhere in Perth.
It was just before Christmas, and incredibly busy, so I may be judging unfairly. But, they did have us jammed in like sardines.

Große gut ausgestattete Cabins mit Küche und eigener Veranda. Parklatz direkt vor der Tür. Waschmaschinen und Trockner sind gegen Gebühe vorhanden. Ein grosses Einkaufszentrum ist in wenigen Minuten mit dem Auto erreichbar. Restaurants sind zu Fuß in ca.15 Minuten erreichbar.
Great park,  loved the grassy sites

Unfortunately we had to leave site. For some reason the site management thought it was a good idea to allow a large function to take place over two days on the grassy area on site adjacent to the powered slab sites. Immediately behind powered slab sites!Whilst getting ready this morning and sorting some laundry on our slab site, at least 15 people turned up in several vehicles and started unloading their event equipment (folding tables, speakers, gazebo’s etc) and began walking it straight through (not around) our slab site. If we had our awning up, they would have been walking under it. I’m talking 2 ft from our sliding door whilst I was stood there. No regard for our personal space or anything. Not even a ‘hello or morning’. The attendees were most certainly not from Australia due to the language spoken so I didn’t attempt to reason or cause a scene. Their children were literally stepping over our ikea laundry bag 2 ft from our sliding door carrying event equipment back and forth! Then before I could grasp what the heck was happening, the music was on. As this was our final night in Perth, I looked at my gf and said this can’t be happening. Then one of the attendees starts testing his microphone and speaker set up with “mic check” literally no more than several meters from our van.
We headed to reception straight away and politely asked for a different site for the evening to which the staff member advised no sites available. I should point out that the vacant sites earlier that morning opposite our pitch, quickly became parking spaces for the attendees! Not campsite users. There were vans parked all over the place including the only road in/out with equipment to be unloaded adjacent to our pitch 🙈. I then said, if there are no other pitches, we will simply have to leave site and find another at short notice much to my disappointment. The staff member only suggested she contacts the function organiser and asks them to be more considerate because she was shocked at the disrespect from the function attendees.
I thought to myself, there’s no chance in hell a phone call is going to do anything. Let’s be real. We managed to get a cancellation pitch at Central Perth Campsite and thank goodness we did. No refund was offered by the big4 staff even though I said we would be leaving as a result so unfortunately I’m leaving this review. The staff member said, we should have received a text message the day before to say this function was being held but no text was received. (Also not much good if you’ve booked weeks in advance and you get a text the day before, just saying…). We confirmed this with another guest who also said they didn’t receive a text either. Then at 12:38pm later that day once checked in at central Perth site, a text did come through informing guests of the event and apologising for the inconvenience. (I presume others on site have also started to complain by this point prompting the text). The star rating would have been higher prior to this but this is just unfathomable to host an event meters away from guests on their holiday. If this is the type of out of the blue spoiler that occurs on this site, I would check with staff ahead of your booking to ensure this doesn’t happen during your stay. Then again, the staff told us before we left that they only found out about the event taking place when management told them the day before so It probably won’t help either way.

Unfortunately very poor customer service and site. We did not end up staying, expected to squeeze between semi permanent residents with trailers and quad bikes extended into our small site. Shame on you big 4
Friendly people and easy to check in
Nice place for healing,
Heerlijke camping! Aan het strand en lekker verwarmd zwembad

Stayed in the small apartments. Walls are super thin so expect to hear everything your neighbour is doing. This isn't the worst though, as you can expect and understand that. However when the cleaners come and start cleaning said apartments at 8.30 am, speaking amd laughing outside the rooms, that is not exceptable. You pay to sleep and rest, thats what you should get. Cleaners cleaning before 9.30-10am is just bad planning and not fair on guests. Wouldnt recommend if you're looking for an actual nights sleep.
Good park that is well managed with helpful staff.  Great amenities and ablutions.
Very welcoming easy going, recommending for solo travelers, FIFO workers, Mad Dog gym just cross the road

only gave one star as I had to to leave a review,
the room was disgusting very dirty, dishes in cupboards still had dried food on them.
I asked if the room could be cleaned and the manager came while we were out and did nothing asked again and nothing was done.
we cleaned it ourselves.
do not recommend staying there
Over priced for what was advertised

This was our second visit to Midland, and unfortunately it may be our last. As a Big 4 property, we were disappointed by the noticeable presence of individuals who appeared to be under the influence of drugs, along with unsupervised children behaving disruptively and using inappropriate language. We would not feel comfortable leaving belongings unsecured or children unattended.

On a positive note, the amenities were well maintained the toilets and showers were clean and the staff were welcoming.
Lots of updates needed. But ok for a few days

Have stayed here many times over the past six yes, from their single rooms to their powered sites. Camp kitchen, laundry and ablutions block always modern, clean and tidy. Book well ahead to avoid disappointment. Situated in the heart of Midland, accessible to all major shops.

We stayed a week. It was a perfect landing spot for our activities at Gudgegannup. The receptionist on arrival (Blonde lady) was lovely,  and checked ys in early.

Big room, 2 double/queen beds, kitchennette, lounge,  TV, dining table, wardrobe. Toilet and showers were shared  but clean, and close by. Car park out front.

Laundry, card operated machines at $7 per load.

Absolutely top notch service. In this case the service can be judged by what happens when something goes wrong. After a booking misshap I was allowed to stay in an upgraded room and I couldn't be happier. Shout out to Rachel on front desk!

It was wet and windy but snug inside.
Very friendly staff and helpful.
Enjoyed the time there.
Caravan site is too small for van , not much room to move it in , hot water in nearby showers not working.  Stay at another park if possible.

2023.Broken down and had to stay here in our van. People & staff were fabulous. Never had one bit of a problem while stayinf here. People were so friendly. Would recommend highly.
2025. Had a great stay again. Love the friendly people & staff there. Great place to stay.

One of the most amazing caravan parks I've ever stayed in and what beats it from the rest are the lovely crew that run this place everyone extreamly friendly and the staff are amazing .
They have helped and made my stay with my two young children a real blessing i am for ever greatfull ..

All the way threw to when u depart thanks again team at big 4 midland ..

I’m extremely saddened that the manager was u able to show us compassion. We were coming from Victoria to attend my sisters funeral, whom I may add was a former employee of the park, we made a booking and plans changed that where out of my control. The park refused to give us a refund dispute the booking only being a few hours old. Very sad that this company have take. Advantage of our situation. I will be cancelling my big 4 membership also.

Stayed in 3 different cabin types due to availability and Big4 generally being busy, very typical so I was Informed, cabins all priced accordingly and fair, clean tidy and well appointed, staff all really friendly all together a pleasant experience all round, would definitely book again.

Classic camp-site experience on well-kept grounds.
Friendly and accommodating staff, access to games room, outdoor pool, and hot tub with shower and toilet blocks. Very clean. The cabins are very nice with all you'd need for a home away from home stay. The entire experience is classic, affordable, and quiet. Close to public transport and local shops while being just a stones throw out from the wine region of Swan Valley.

WiFi is so weak that I can’t even use, thus technically speaking, it is useless.  Parking space is too small for our SUV, we have to take 3 points turn to park and leave every time.  Bathroom is too narrow to turn when you are a bit fatter and very distributed to the roommates it located inside a room.  Overall, it is awful except staff friendliness.

The wifi is HORRIBLE, it is better to throw yourself into the jungle without signal and outside contact than to use the wifi provided. The floor is also very nasty, my feet went from clean to being covered in dust 3 steps in the cabin.
Good location close to shopping
Wall were very thin ,I had a guy snoring like a freight train was coming behind me and in  another in next room in front was snoring Not a little of sleep.clean and tidy room
Fantastic place to stay very family friendly 😀 accommodation is clean and comfortable 👌
Awesome management and clean facility, had a wonderful stay
We have 15 of us who have flown over from Victoria and we are here for a week. We have 4 cabins and they a great for what we need. I would recommend to stay here.
What a gem this place is. From caring and efficient staff to well appointed rooms and facilities...do yourself a favour and check this place out!
Easy check in ,clean rooms ,not far to midland central .
Nice place to stay

Cabin has no other lighting other than the ceiling fluros which makes it hard if 1 wants to sleep, the other has to sit in the dark. Lack of useful power points if you need to plug in a sleep machine & nowhere but the floor to put the machine as there are no bedside tables

Clean & tidy but lacks the small things that make staying more enjoyable

We were in one of the new cabins in this park for a few days. The cabin was exceptionally good in terms of cleanliness and facilities provided. The park was crowded with many long-term customers. Kitchen BBQ facilities were limited. The Wi-Fi and TV signal in our cabin was very weak. Could not use the television for any content and could not use my streaming device due to the poor signal quality. Overall our experience was bit below average as compared to other similar parks.
Really quiet and clean! I’ll be back for sure
An older park that could do with a freshen up, but our room was properly cleaned and equipped. Staff were excellent.
Reception staff very rough..Typical caravan park

Unfortunately the advertising photos are deceptive, not quite as green and well kept as advertised. Stayed in small cabin, very clean and reasonably well presented, kitchen area lacking cupboard doors  and some basic utensils for cooking. Quiet site with long term residents, while area could do with some upkeep.

One other review contributor mentioned the caravan was “classic” & she could not have been accurate.
The amenities are dated, with small shower cubicles, but very clean.
The sites are close together, but ok.

The cost of using the washing machines & dryers are the most expensive I have ever come across - $7 per load, you can’t pay by cash - only card & get slugged an extra .43c for that!!

The park is close to the main shopping district & Perth, keeping in mind that the traffic to Perth is horrendous.
Also the park is on the flight path & can be noisy.

Only stayed one night.
Our site was great, plenty of room for both van and vehicle on hard pad.
Showers were hot and facilities clean , an older block but fine for us.
Very convenient location.
The permanents were no problem
Staff were very friendly and helpful
We’ll be back

I stayed for 2 night in the April school holidays in a family cabin (shared bathroom).

The first thing to note is that this is a 'Classic' Big4. It's an older campground with simple amenities. With that in mind, my stay (with my 10 year old) was excellent and great value for money. The staff are the loveliest, and the place was spotlessly clean.

Our cabin had 2 beds and they were nicely made with comfortable mattresses, bedding and lots of pillows. There were warm fluffy blankets in the wardrobe and we loved them. The kitchen was well equipped, much better than I thought. There was ample crockery, plenty of pots and pans, and all the utensils I needed.
The unit doesn't have a full oven (it has a hob and microwave) so i used the shared Camp Kitchen and was impressed - great oven, all the utensils I could ever need, and very clean.

The shared bathrooms which are adjacent to the cabin I stayed in were perfectly adequate and very clean all the time.

The swimming pool is FREEZING. I can't work out how it was so cold but it did not stop children swimming in it. The loungers around the pool were great for me and other parents to lie in and supervise. It was great to see staff pass by every half hour and check to make sure everything was okay in the pool area.

One unexpected highlight was the DVD library in the games room. Our cabin had a DVD player and my child had never seen a DVD in real life. We watched a few movies and really enjoyed the experience - its a great range of DVDs. Plus I found a good book in the collection to read.

It's worth noting that the park has quite a lot of permanent residents in caravans with lean-tos. They were friendly and the park was quiet. It was a surprise, I hadn't seen that before, but it was not a problem. We slept well and heard nothing in the night. There is plenty of car parking.

I loved my get away to Big4 Midland and will be back. As long as future visitors remember it is a 'Classic' park, it should meet all your expectations. Being a 'Classic' it is great value for money! We paid $118 per night in the peak school holiday period and it was totally worth it.

Park is average for cost,  facilities and security.|Heating for pool and spa wasn’t working and had to ask to find this out after going in! |Amenities blocks clean however lots of ‘randoms’ appear to use them and laundry etc after hours. Not very secure. |Some of the permanents act like they own the park telling others where to park and blocking access. |Close to Swan Valley and some very good wineries.

Had a powered site which was fine except permanent residents act like they own the park and block access with cars, tell you where to park etc and none of their business.
Heated pool and spa weren’t working with no signage etc.  Had to ask to be told heater was broken. Partial refunds should have been provided as this was one of the reasons we booked here.
Ablution blocks need upgrade. Randoms seem to come in after hours to use showers and laundry. Security poor.
Close to Swan Valley wineries and good shopping precinct.

Unfortunately I didn't even stay the night after paying for it, it was full of insects and the toilet flusher was broken I sliced my finger on it. I couldn't stay there because it was so small 2 people you couldn't move, when booking I asked for a chalet type accommodation this was a demountable cabin usually for single use. The lady said she would refund me the money yet I never received anything back. I'll never stay there again.     AFTER MY REVIEW WAS POSTED I RECEIVED A PHONE CALL FROM The BIG4 CARAVAN PARK I DID NO'T  RECEIVE A REFUND DUE TO A CLERICAL ERROR. IM GRATEFUL THEY TOOK THE TIME TO CONTACT ME & WILL REFUND ME WITHIN A FEW DAYS. MANAGEMENT ARE VERY NICE & I FEEL AS THOUGH I SHOULD MAKE THIS KNOW AS IT WOULD BE UNFAIR BOT TO ACKNOWLEDGE THEIR EFFORTS TO ACCOMADATE ME FOR THAT I THANK YOU & IM ALSO VERY GRATEFUL.
for me it was the internet & the shower curtain & noisy neighbours that I was disappointed with the most 😒😒 but rooms were clean.

Tidy and clean park.
Rooms were clean and sufficient for the intended purpose.

Cabins and shared kitchen, facilities are really clean. Refreshing pool, the park itself is calm and residents are friendly. Staff is gorgeous, highly recommend.
Petrol station and Midland Gate shopping centre nearby.  Will come back for sure. 👌🏻

Stayed in a small double ensuite, bed was comfortable, AC good,  clean and tidy but small ants spoiled our visit, they were everywhere and super bad in the communal donga kitchen..pool was ok, spa was cold..easy check in online, would stay again
Caravan Park doesn't allow long-term stays
Very friendly & helpful staff
We had a very small not very nice cabin. We only booked it because it was fairly close to the airport. There was a pool and that was nice.

Awesome park and is really quite so nothing to worry about when going to sleep. Park amenities are a bit outdated but are kept so clean I could practically lick the floor. Cabin that we stayed in was spectacular and was very clean when we arrived and beds were so comfortable I couldn’t leave them. Overall wonderful park and amenities.

Everything was fine, not luxurious but decent. However, the surroundings with nearby residents make you feel uncomfortable as they just keep staring. For a reason, I requested a refund, and they accepted it, but it took 2-3 weeks with some calls and reminders, which could have been handled better.
Silent and great time to relax!!
nice budget hotel..worth money. good and well equipped with kitchen

We arrived early and the staff were happy to accommodate us checking in early. I had been told via email that the pedal karts were free for members but advised by Rachel at reception they weren’t, but they would allow us to have an hour free. ||The activity room was great to a degree… the air hockey table was damaged and the table tennis bats were pretty horrible. ||I went to cook on the communal bbq and it wouldn’t turn on. I realised the circuit breaker had flipped, so once I flipped it back I could use the facilities.  ||The pool and spa area states that the spa was in a heated pool area and not to stay in for more than 15 minutes. The spa was definitely not heated, it was freezing and I confirmed this with reception….||The TV in the room doesn’t offer steaming and our feet were black from walking with no shoes on. The master room fan was either ready for lift off or not moving enough to do anything. ||We checked out at 9:45am, I said thank you for having us and ignored and I received a phone call around 10:30am asking when we planned to check out….||Overall. Somewhere to stay with a few activities. 3/5
Couldnt thank all the staff for all they done to make us comfortable.  Thankyou.
Every thing was 100% can't fault anything, staff are great
Very good park

OPEN THE DOOR ... from the porch to two doors, that open into two separate cabins, so that is cute.||Beautiful wooden floors, spacious room that has everything you need to spend a chill relaxing stay. Open the sliding door that takes you out onto the balcony which looks over a lovely field. Oh Lord. Loved this place. 1B or 2B Honeyeater and you will be sorted.
Good location,  helpful staff,  clean sites,  good amenities
Nice see view

The hotel service was top notched and very professional for a 3star rating. The staff were very friendly, professional and accommodating. I had to travel early and deposited 2 bags at the counter. They had it sent to my room prior to my arrival as I had arrived late for the check in. The rooms were very clean, no funny smells and the linen were sparkling. Definite good recommendation for good prices.
The staff are absolutely beautiful, so helpful and nice.

The location is good. A short drive to the midland gate mall, which is a rather huge mall with shops like Woolworth, Target to get   of things done. The chalet is clean and the staff is friendly.The one set back is the WiFi signal is weak. I switch off my WiFi and use my mobile data instead.

Really disappointed, Noah’s ark would have had more style than this place. Beds are uncomfortable mirror is scratched roof is very pregnant worried roof will fall in, left the park with the door locked came back it was left unlocked, bin is way to small chairs are mismatched cornices are falling apart paint on the roof is peeling television is terrible quality chairs are a bit dodgy one of the lights isn’t working handrail is broken

I was pleasantly surprised how quiet it was, could even hear the birds twittering.
the room we had was clean and had most of what we needed. Had tv, mid sized fridge, microwave, kettle, free coffee and long life milk.
own bathroom, with nice hot water even if pressure was a bit on low side.
However shower floor was a bit slippery :( I am mobility challenged so probably should have asked for a shower chair.
Bedding was clean, though mattress a little firm. The fold out lounge was ok to sit on but not really made for adult to sleep on.
Felt safe , and short drive into shops.
A drawback was the threat of a $50 fine for arriving after business hours. As,a disabled driver   I like to travel at a leisurely pace, and stop to have a break along the way.
Would stay there again

Booked a small unsuite for 2 nights- clean throughout and great shower and really comfortable bed. So for budget accommodation really good but there is no control in the park grounds after hours - I was staying when my partner was in SJOG hospital for 2 nights but ended up leaving after 1 night therefore wasting money! And booking something else.People having full on domestics, people dragging tables and chairs all about and smashing bottles into the small hours isn't acceptable 😞
Cabin was nice and surrounding trees. It is good& quiet in off season for a reviver.

I spend a few days few times a year in my van at this caravan park.
I've put 5 starts for the rooms, but I haven't seen tlor stayed in them.
The amenities are spotless, warm showers with lots of water pressure. Toilets and floor are always clean, friendly and helpful staff at reception. It is one of the cheapest in Perth, close to any shops that you wish. Definitely recommended.
Quiet and Convenient location, and caring team. Love it!

We stayed in one of their budget onsite cabins. When you read budget, you assume it’s going to be on the lower end of the scale, nothing fancy which is fine as it’s just a bed for a stopover.  upon arrival everything was seamless and then we opened the door to our cabin. It was very out of date, the bunk bed screws weren’t even in (reported to staff) and the adults bed was like a rock, literally. The cupboards and furniture had wood chips missing and the cabinetry was falling apart. Not the end of the world for $150 but you can drive 5 minutes up the road to Swan Valley Discovery Park and get an amazing room for the same price or $10-20 more.
Friendly staff,  clean facilities and within easy driving of shops and restaurants.
Convenient, clean amenities & laundry. Camp kitchen amazing. Unfortunately we were victims of a current spate of burglaries. I hope the offender is apprehended soon.
Great location, friendly reception and staff. Accommodated us last minute for a early checkin.
Great camp kitchen, women's showers even have a bath
We have both stayed in a room and powered site. The staff here gave helpful nature and hard working. They are willing to listen. The place is nice and good for family.

Book specifically a two bedroom for my workers trip which consists of one male n female from qld and they locked one room saying that we might bring other people and we only booked for 2. Poor advertisement poor service will not stay again especially to come after a long flight from Brisbane.

Pillows are good but I think I've left my own pillow in chalet 11 . I will be back  in perth again and will be booking in again at the Big 4  .|I like staying there it is friendly and good people. Close to the midland gate shopping centre  and all other places  you would like to see .
Totally love this place friendly clean family friendly and pet's are aloud with short term visits WOW. Love and Blessings to you that read this 😉

It was Donger style rooms
Perfect for my need and a great price.
There is nothing to complain about! Absolutely fantastic, highly recommend for anyone and my partner will definitely be staying again in the future!
Very quiet caravan park and the staff are very helpful and polite. Amenities are clean and tidy. Campers kitchen clean and tidy.

No frills room for 1pax. Toilet is clean with sufficient towels and toiletries. Comes with a TV, hot water boiler and free coffee/tea. As room is next to common shared kitchen, can get alittle noisy. Overall, a good stay for my 2 nights.

These guys are unreal!
Just stayed 6 nights and they were extremely helpful!
Great location, great friendly staff and clean amenities.
Thanks for having us
Not what you'd expect from a big 4 permanents there need to be made to clean up their sites and all the condiments in the camp kitchen should be disposed of not very hygiene

Never again, the worst big4  ever. Toilets  very clean. As for sites what a joke long grass couldn't  run grey water down into drainage  over growen and blocked with rubbish.  Some permanent  sites looked like a tip full off junk and old furnishings.  Camp kitchen  was nice, except  for all the sauce  bottles been licked and sucked on by little  kids how disgusting  some parents  thought  it was funny. For what you get this park is way over priced.  Front end staff was very nice cleaners
very friendly i was even told by one of the cleaners  i could still use the mens toilet while the female cleaner was still cleaning which kinda  shocked me but i declined  but as for the rest off the park . Not for me

First night in cabin well appointed but needed airing out.
Then 2 nights once our van arived, very friendly and helpful staff

I do not often leave reviews, but on this occasion I need to warn fellow travellers. We booked a concrete slab site for 6 nights and upon arrival this is what we were met with. We were a late arrival which is on us, but we had no forewarning we would be arriving to a broken and unsafe site. We had no other option as the office had closed but to set ourselves up. No forewarning, no contact about the state of the site despite calling them in the afternoon to advise of late arrival. However, to make things worse, I have emailed them about my concerns - more how unsafe the site is that anything - and they have ignored me. I just want people to be warned of what might meet them upon arrival.
Have been before and we keep coming back ! ... lovely quiet location, close to shops and train....

handy to Perth and the Perth Hills, parking outside the room, Room is clean and tidy, Staff are friendly and efficient. Kitchen well stocked. Beds comfortable and water pressure very good. Great price as well.

Arrived late in evening after a late flight. Didn’t stay in room as couldn’t handle the smell. Stayed with friends. Spoke to office next morning and they said manager was out and would contact us in regards to a refund. As of today still haven’t heard from them.

Was a great place to stay, receptionist was very welcoming and Kind, her customer service was professional and genuine it was a wonderful start to our stay. It was kid friendly, room was tidy and clean the beds were also comfortable and kitchenette well supplied, location was nice and was close to everywhere we needed to go. Would highly recommend

Needed a place after very late flight into Perth. Too late to drive up the bush hundreds of kms. Park left key in lock safe. All good clean and tidy small but quiet park and easy access to freeways etc. N S E W.
Lots of run down permanent sites, service was good, amenities were very good. Not a regular big 4.
Choose to where we needed to be. Staff were lovely. Unit was great
Quite and clean caravan park with rooms

Booked here for amenities.  Find out the pool is closed. Need a part? Understand that things happen, however the communication is non existent. Did not let us know on check in or prior. My wife and a fellow camper complained. The reaction of Oh Well is just not good enough.
The amenities get cleaned at 7.30 am. Sometimes.  That's both of them. Your invited to use them anyway. Really.
On check in you are told to use the key or swipe card to use the amenities.  No point, the door is always wedged open.  You can see right in to the cubicles as you walk past.
As a BIG 4 member l expected so much more.
Very disappointing.
Loving it to stay in perth close to Perth airport sooo obsessed with living close to Perth airport and city

This was a last min booking due to change of plan and booked 2 days before, in March. The location was great (15 mins walk to Midland shopping mall, 8 mins drive to Swan Valley). The area was also quiet. Booked a powered site and was given one near the amenity block (plus point!). Noticed there were quite a number of perm residents, spouse encountered one in the toliet who was drunk but not rowdy. Was pleasantly surprised that the guy still managed to wipe dry the shower area haha. Despite that, the park was quiet.

Would still stay for the location and well-maintained shower/toilets.
cleanliness, welcome, service and very reasonable price
Neat and tidy park well maintained, amenities nice and clean not far from the city about 20mins ,sites are big and level

I'm visiting Australia for the first time and taking Big4 tourists as our hotel is very convenient. Near the public accommodation (bus stop just in front), got a swimming pool which my kids love so much. A small yet complete appliance in the hotel room with great hospitality for my 3 kids. The customer service is just very helpful and cheerful. Never been to a resident with lots of caravan sites, so worth the stay to create memories in perth.

Great camp kitchen 👍👍plenty of shared items to use
Lovely pool/ spa area
Ablation areas clean and tidy well presented.
Great stay friendly staff
The cabin was in bad shape

Very much a city caravan park. The amenities were dated, but I must say, super clean and tidy. Good size camp kitchen and the toilet and shower alway clean.

The grounds itself are very much below average. The vast majority are permanent and very untidy.

Most of the caravan sites are in a state disrepair, like ours, an old 50mm pipe out of the ground and smashed, don't fix it, just paint it with white paint. Concrete pad so out of level you need to use ramps.

The local permanent resident must see other people so infrequently, they need to stop and stare with open mouth. Next time I will make some photos of myself for them to keep.

The park is very much on the "classic" end and must only be clinging onto being a Big4

Worst caravan  site ever! Separated from group with whom we booked. Noticed other sites remained empty or came in days later. White walls of shed and camp kitchen reflected heat all day onto shadeless,grasses sight. Left early. Paid 5 stayed 3.
Clean, good quality, peaceful stay.

Parked our van here for 4 nights. Lovely park, the sites were large with concrete and grass. Amenities were clean and well laid out. The location is perfect for a visit to the valley. We rode our bikes to the Robbie Williams concert and avoided all the traffic issues. Would stay here again.

Great location, close to State Equestrian Centre, Swan Valley and Midland.

The rooms and cabins are always spotless and staff at reception friendly and helpful.

Love the little cabins, with beautiful views of the trees.
Great place to stay. Nice and clean with very big rooms and cooking facilities. And very Friendly helpfull staff
will be back
two days stay at small cabin ensuite. The room was very clean and the receptionist was helpful/friendly

The front desk staff were so cheerful,helpful & accommodating considering we booked last minute. Nothing was too much trouble, even down to booking a second night & finding a spot for our second tow vehicle & trailer. Park is an older one but clean & tidy. Permanent residents are friendly. Some sites are tight to get into but with a little patience & skill it can be done. Quiet park also. Will stay again if we are ever in the area. Thank you for making our stay a good one.

Good location and easy access even for big vehicles. The amenities are nice and clean. There is not much room in between the spots so no privacy if want to sit outside. As with most of these campgrounds, the Wifi is bad.
We had an enjoyable 2 night stay at a great price. We would stay again and would recommend the park.

We stayed in a family studio room. It was a big room. The beds were comfortable, the linen was clean. The decor was a little outdated, but tidy. The bathrooms were close to the room, and they were always kept clean and the shower was hot and had good water supply. The pool spa was not heated. Overall a good stop for our two nights.
Clean and comfortable room with ease of service.

Great place to stay conveniently located in central midland is fairly quiet considering the location very friendly and helpful staff is nice and tidy well kept and inviting very well kept amenities and the pool is cold 🥶 😀 have stayed several times now and no doubt will again
Great Park Very accommodating to our special needs
Lovely caravan park with excellent, well maintained facilities. Especially appreciate the clean and well lit ablutions with the best showers!
Very good place but pity tv was not working especially with young kids in tow

I found the rooms very nice and clean.
Also very good booking service.

The team at BIG4 Perth Midland Tourisk Park is amazing - very well-communicated and helpful throughout my stay for 2 nights as a stopover from Melbourne. I didn't get to use any facilities as most of my time is out and about. However, the room is spacious and bed is comfy. Thank you once again for your hospitality.
Nice place good service. Danial was amazing always busy always running around, helped us with a broken pipe which my wife broke.6 stars

All the staff were unbelievably friendly, willing to help and gave my wife and i alot of tips. They were fantastic in giving us a place to store the caravan with power for a night whilst we went over to Rottnest Island for a small fee of $20.00. That was great and made it so much easier for us to tour Rottnest Island without the worry of the caravan. Amenities were very good. Great park, and would be happy to stay again. Thank you to those lovely girls in reception over a couple days. There were at least four different girls and ladies and they were all brilliant.
Very friendly staff,good facilities. Comfy beds,I slept awesome 🙂
Awesome  I am much appreciated  of your services for helping  me and THANK YOU   AWESOME

Not a great experience unfortunately. Didn’t feel secure. Small caravan site, we didn’t put awning out so we could park car. Allot of permanents and long stayers in cabins. The cleaner and maintenance guy do a great job at keeping the place tidy but amenities are old. Wouldn’t stay again.

Loved our stay at Midland Big 4. The interconnecting Chalet we stayed in was very roomy and clean and well set up for large groups/families. Park was small, private and quiet and close to shopping centres and takeaway shops. Facilities were really well looked after and clean easy to locate and use. Was so lovely waking up to our beautiful view from our chalet so peaceful would definitely recommend and stay again
Lovely easy going staff. Location is not too far from the train station, I walked it in 30 minutes. Excellent kitchen and amenities.
Just had a site for our caravan. Site was large, nice grasses areas, clean facilities and wonderful helpful staff.
Great place to end our camper van trip in Western Australia, short drive to lots of shops. Very quiet at night, amenities were all clean. Over all a nice little park to spend two nights in.
Great park safe
Fifo worker always  good to  have a  good  sleep  before  flying  out to work  nice quiet  place to stay and close to the airport
Very nice place to stop close to the shopping   enter
Stayed in our caravan friendly and helpful staff nice and quiet
Highly recommended, all staff are lovely & polite, rooms clean will be back to stay
The location is very convenient to functions in the Swan Valley area, and the unit itself was very comfortable indeed, spacious, clean and I highly recommend.  Great place 👍

My mum & myself thoroughly enjoyed our stay we booked in for 1night but enjoyed it so much we booked in for another 2 nights, the cabin was so relaxing & it had everything you could want loved it loved it.
Negative :Rubbish tins were all full and never emptied.    Dismal lighting out side ammenities.  Positive:   The ammenities  were spotlessly clean and smelt excellent.   Site was a generous size.

Well located caravan park with adequate powered site. Clean amenities with plenty of showers and toilets. Super awesome kitchen! Great entertainment room with heaps of DVDs and books. Would hope to have more bins or higher collection rate as the bins filled up very quickly. The blue gum trees can be quite annoying as the fruits kept dropping onto the caravan too and can be quite difficult to remove.

I really hope the owners and upper management review the footage watching the managers child roam free with no supervision.
We were only “disruptive” in the last 3 days. But stayed for months, all because we stood up for ourselves
One of the worst experiences. The managers child roam the the park and always no supervision. Constantly expected to be a free baby sitter of said children. Every time I’d try keep my kids at home the managers kids would take them away every chance they got. The managers daughter locked our daughter in the disabled bathrooms (ours is 2 years younger then their daughter)(my daughter is 5) then blamed us. We don’t even know the code so how would my daughter? I received a written warning for this. They needed to keep their children at home so they are not constantly taking my kids away from my site and I’m having constantly chase mine across the park every 5 minutes
The managers have a fire pit and would have people in there house constantly for drinks. We had seen this fire pit and they told us an order for heaters had been put in, 2 for the camp kitchen. Yet they kept one for there house at the cost of Big4 and only installed one in the camp kitchen. We got a written warning for using an enclosed fire pit for one night. (Manager is the example of behaviour, with them owning a fire pit then and using it. It’s not crazy for residents to think they can do the same) I’m sure they will claim they have never used it. How convenient
They would allow people to block our only foot path to the toilet block. When I tried to tell management I was told “we are trying to cause drama” the people staying at the lot claim the managers gave them permission to block the foot path and no one should walk through
So my child and myself would have to walk across hoses and power cords risking tripping when it’s night time instead of using the communal path. (Having cord lay all over the floor for people to walk over is against all OHS regulations)
A resident in the Park gave our 12 year old a vape. The resident claimed to of never seeing this vape. We brought this up with management and again they claim it’s in the name of drama. Then claimed my child must of stole the vape. I questioned how that would be possible since the said resident had “never seen the vape”. Manager told me that oh well it must be that I work in a vape shop (which I do not) the constant story changing is a clear sign of lying and toxic behaviour. Cameras everywhere even at the caravan in question so should no issues providing videos evidence before making such a wild claim. They could not produce any. Just said “people sore her go there”. Well yeah generally how visiting someone goes you have to walk and see if there home 🤦‍♂️
When we told them we were leaving early as we could no longer deal with unprofessional behaviour and standards they have set. They quickly became quite defensive and behaved like children. They decided to lie and have attempted to get us black listed because of “our children’s” disruptive behaviour and money owing. Why is my child and myself penalised for the influence and behaviour set by the managers and managers children. We left the park with 13 days in advance with ledgers as proof.
We have seen the email and it’s quit disgusting full grown adults would act like this. My child wouldn’t lie like this
OHS is breached often when the managers child is doing maintenance work all over the park. 10/11yr old During school hours!
It is very sad that Daniel the maintenance manager is such coward. He lies and hides behind them. Gives you the finger then physically runs away scared. They honestly have no idea how to parent. The house provided to them in the park is a disgusting pig sty that the owners should check it. Once we had enough of their children they tried to slander ours 🤦‍♂️
When we left he was trying to make me react. A “Professional manager” saying “haha we sent emails haha my partner is the other manager for this park”. All on camera in the front office. Because that’s how adults work 👌👌
Easy to get to
Lovely staff - grounds well maintained
It's was just like being at work, eg in a donga. The bed wasn't that comfortable but was ok to sleep on.
Amazing, best stay
The place was clean all round.
Check in was very straight forward. Staff were friendly, the accommodation was very clean and tidy, bed was comfortable, the verandah on the back of the cabin overlooked bushland.
Have stayed there for about the last 13 years and the park is at its best currently. Friendly and helpful staff. Everything you need for a comfortable overnight stay is here..
I needed a safe spot to camp for a night while travelling solo and Midland Big 4 was awesome.  Accomodating, friendly, fantastic amenities, easy access and easy to find.  I would gladly stay again.

Stayed 2 nights here and was very impressed with the facilities. The hottest showers I've experienced at a Caravan Park, also very clean & tidy. A brilliantly equipped Campers kitchen and large laundry. We'll done, keep up the good work.
It’s ok for a night or 2, staff is really nice and helpful. Facilities are clean
Well set up unit.  Very clean.

A smaller and older park with a lot of permanent residents.
The staff are lovely and go out of their way to assist you.
The park is very well maintained and the amenities are kept spotless.
We enjoyed our two week stay here.
Great, clean and tidy accommodation. Loved our stay
Clean rooms, Comfortable beds, A/C and WiFi, helpful staff, what more could you ask for.

Certain quirks made our stay uncomfortable. 1. Significant presence of permanent residents made for a sense of proprietary ownership.  For example one person used 3 out of the 4 washing machines available at same time even though she had only started one when we arrived!  Large son stood by, intimidating.  2. Only 1 toilet access key given for 2 independent adults.  3. The area is central to services and the airport, but also feels pretty edgy.  Heard 3 police sirens over a couple of nights.   The toilets themselves were kept spotless, cleaners obviously very good standard.  Staff at reception were also courteous and professional.

This site is within the Perth Metro area yet totally secluded from the hustle bustle of the City. Say 30 minutes drive and you are in Perth CBD. But hey, why would you go to the CBD when you are camping 🏕️… we stayed in the tents ⛺️.. but the park has cabins . Self ensuite rooms, Chalets, swimming 🏊‍♂️ pool, kids play area, common community area , nice roads with in the property.. lots of space … so old can have A real break … good restaurants in swan valley .. Guildford …

Stayed 5 nights due to having fridge repairs in motorhome. Very well located. Easy bus and train service into Midland and Perth plus wineries etc. Site was large concrete slab. Facilities clean and tidy and staff were very helpful. Nice and quiet as well. Recommend it to all.

I was so lucky to get my room upgraded it was fantastic are amazing room! Love it the only down side was that the WIFI didn’t work for me but not the end of the world thankyou so much BIG 4 Midland park your lovely customer service I will be back!

Thank you 🙏 🥹
Stayed a week. Great location. Very clean bathrooms.
All good
